---
title: "Dataset Explorer"
subtitle: "Searchable and filterable inventory of IBD omics datasets"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
---

<div class="page-intro">
This table lists all datasets currently indexed in the IBD Omics Explorer. Use the search box and filters to narrow results. All metadata are conservative annotations derived from public records; fields marked <em>Unclear</em> require manual verification. Dataset availability and access status should be confirmed before analysis.
</div>

## Filters and Search

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
data = FileAttachment("data/ibd_omics_datasets.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
omicsOptions  = ["All", ...Array.from(new Set(
  data.flatMap(d => (d.omics_layer || "").split(";").map(s => s.trim()))
).values()).filter(Boolean).sort()]

diseaseOptions = ["All", "CD", "UC", "IBD", "Pediatric", "Multi-omics", "Controls"]

accessOptions = [
  "All",
  "Public raw data",
  "Public processed data",
  "Public portal",
  "Controlled access",
  "Publication only",
  "Unclear"
]

sampleOptions = ["All", ...Array.from(new Set(
  data.flatMap(d => (d.sample_type || "").split(";").map(s => s.trim()))
).values()).filter(Boolean).sort()]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof searchText = Inputs.text({
  label: "Search all fields",
  placeholder: "e.g. scRNA-seq, pediatric, colon, GWAS …",
  width: "100%"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof omicsFilter = Inputs.select(omicsOptions, {
  label: "Omics layer",
  value: "All"
})

viewof diseaseFilter = Inputs.select(diseaseOptions, {
  label: "Disease",
  value: "All"
})

viewof accessFilter = Inputs.select(accessOptions, {
  label: "Data access status",
  value: "All"
})

viewof sampleFilter = Inputs.select(sampleOptions, {
  label: "Sample type",
  value: "All"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
filtered = {
  let result = data;

  if (omicsFilter !== "All") {
    result = result.filter(d =>
      (d.omics_layer || "").toLowerCase().includes(omicsFilter.toLowerCase())
    );
  }

  if (diseaseFilter !== "All") {
    result = result.filter(d =>
      (d.disease || "").toLowerCase().includes(diseaseFilter.toLowerCase())
    );
  }

  if (accessFilter !== "All") {
    result = result.filter(d =>
      (d.data_access_status || "").toLowerCase().includes(accessFilter.toLowerCase())
    );
  }

  if (sampleFilter !== "All") {
    result = result.filter(d =>
      (d.sample_type || "").toLowerCase().includes(sampleFilter.toLowerCase())
    );
  }

  if (searchText && searchText.trim() !== "") {
    const term = searchText.trim().toLowerCase();
    result = result.filter(d =>
      Object.values(d).some(v => v && String(v).toLowerCase().includes(term))
    );
  }

  return result;
}

resultCount = html`<p style="font-size:0.86rem;color:#5d5c57;margin:0.3rem 0 0.6rem 0;">
  Showing <strong>${filtered.length}</strong> of <strong>${data.length}</strong> datasets
</p>`
```

## Dataset Table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(filtered, {
  columns: [
    "dataset_name",
    "accession",
    "omics_layer",
    "disease",
    "population",
    "sample_type",
    "tissue_site",
    "data_access_status",
    "curation_status",
    "potential_use_cases"
  ],
  header: {
    dataset_name:       "Dataset",
    accession:          "Accession",
    omics_layer:        "Omics Layer",
    disease:            "Disease",
    population:         "Population",
    sample_type:        "Sample Type",
    tissue_site:        "Tissue Site",
    data_access_status: "Access Status",
    curation_status:    "Curation Status",
    potential_use_cases:"Potential Use Cases"
  },
  width: {
    dataset_name:        220,
    accession:           120,
    omics_layer:         170,
    disease:             170,
    population:           90,
    sample_type:         140,
    tissue_site:         120,
    data_access_status:  180,
    curation_status:     160,
    potential_use_cases: 300
  },
  rows: 20,
  maxWidth: 1200
})
```

---

## Full Metadata View

Click a row above to see more columns, or use the expanded table below for additional fields.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Inputs.table(filtered, {
  columns: [
    "dataset_id",
    "dataset_name",
    "accession",
    "repository",
    "publication_year",
    "platform",
    "study_design",
    "sample_size_subjects",
    "longitudinal",
    "controlled_access",
    "clinical_metadata",
    "endoscopy_available",
    "treatment_metadata",
    "limitations",
    "notes"
  ],
  header: {
    dataset_id:          "ID",
    dataset_name:        "Dataset",
    accession:           "Accession",
    repository:          "Repository",
    publication_year:    "Year",
    platform:            "Platform",
    study_design:        "Study Design",
    sample_size_subjects:"N Subjects",
    longitudinal:        "Longitudinal",
    controlled_access:   "Controlled Access",
    clinical_metadata:   "Clinical Metadata",
    endoscopy_available: "Endoscopy",
    treatment_metadata:  "Treatment Data",
    limitations:         "Limitations",
    notes:               "Notes"
  },
  width: {
    dataset_id:          50,
    dataset_name:        200,
    accession:           120,
    repository:          160,
    publication_year:     60,
    platform:            140,
    study_design:        140,
    sample_size_subjects: 90,
    longitudinal:         90,
    controlled_access:    90,
    clinical_metadata:    90,
    endoscopy_available:  90,
    treatment_metadata:   90,
    limitations:          280,
    notes:                300
  },
  rows: 20,
  maxWidth: 1200
})
```

---

## Data Access Status Legend

| Label | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Public raw data | Raw data files (FASTQ, CEL, IDAT, mzML, count matrices, etc.) are publicly downloadable |
| Public processed data | Processed expression/abundance matrix is available; raw data may not be public |
| Public portal | Data are accessible via a public portal or database |
| Controlled access | Indexed publicly but requires application or institutional approval |
| Publication only | Described in a publication; reusable data files are not clearly available |
| Unclear | Repository record exists but data availability or metadata are incomplete |

<div class="disclaimer">
<strong>Note.</strong> Data access status and metadata were assigned conservatively based on public records available at the time of curation. Availability may change. Always verify directly with the source repository before initiating analysis.
</div>
